_comment: Pred-09-5 matching principle: stable receivers satisfy TI ~ 1/H. Maps environmental entropy H [0,1] to recommended TI [0,100]. In RPCS1 this is operationalized as a deterministic engineering rule for AI agents and should be validated against production traces. Above H=0.27, TI clips to TI_MIN and the Matching Principle loses resolution; this is a floor-binding artifact, not a falsification.
_source: IMM Paper 9, RPCS-1. AI-agent runtime mapping remains an empirical validation target.

oscillation_threshold._comment: Paper 9 §oscillatory threshold: SG × TI > max_product_SG_TI triggers oscillation risk warning
